about.title: About Dr. Mitchell
about.subtitle: Dedicated to advancing orthopedic excellence and patient-centered care.

bio.description: With over 15 years of experience in orthopedic surgery, Dr. Alexander Mitchell has dedicated his career to helping patients regain their mobility and quality of life. Trained at some of the world's most prestigious medical institutions, he combines cutting-edge surgical techniques with a deeply personal approach to patient care.
bio.description2: Dr. Mitchell believes that every patient deserves to understand their condition fully and to be actively involved in their treatment decisions. This philosophy of transparent, collaborative care has earned him the trust of thousands of patients.

item1.title: Doctor of Medicine (M.D.)
item1.description: Graduated with honors, specializing in musculoskeletal medicine

item2.title: Residency in Orthopedic Surgery
item2.description: Five-year residency program with focus on joint reconstruction

item3.title: Fellowship in Sports Medicine
item3.description: Advanced training in arthroscopic surgery and sports injuries

item4.title: Advanced Certification
item4.description: Board certification with subspecialty in adult reconstruction

certifications.title: Certifications & Memberships
certifications.item2: Fellow, American Academy of Orthopedic Surgeons

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.quote: I believe in treating the whole person, not just the condition. Every patient who walks through my door deserves compassion, transparency, and the highest standard of care. My goal is not simply to perform surgery — it's to restore your ability to live the life you love.
philosophy.author: Dr. Alexander Mitchell

message.title: A Personal Message
message.content: Thank you for considering me for your orthopedic care. I understand that seeking medical treatment can be daunting, and I want you to know that my team and I are here to support you every step of the way. From your first consultation to your final follow-up, we are committed to making your experience as comfortable and successful as possible.
